notes: jamo_position: vowel (jungseong only). Most common Korean vowel. Appears in 물 밥 라면 카페 etc. Tall vertical stroke — visually distinct.

jamo_position: choseong (silent placeholder) AND jongseong (ng sound). Highest rule_gateway_value: ㅇ as initial is the key rule that unlocks all pure-vowel syllables. Critical to teach early. Appears in 입구 은행 영화 음악.
jamo_position: vowel. Very common. Single vertical stroke — simplest Hangul vowel. Appears in 김치 택시 영화.
jamo_position: vowel. Very common. Horizontal stroke — visually distinct from vertical vowels. Appears in 불고기 주차 노래.
jamo_position: choseong and jongseong. Very common. Clean L-shape. Both initial (나) and final batchim. Appears in 면 라면 노래.
jamo_position: vowel. Common. Mirror of ㅗ — teach together to exploit visual pairing. Appears in 국 출구 음악.
jamo_position: choseong and jongseong. Very common. Square shape — easy to remember as 'mouth'. Appears in 면 라면 음악.
jamo_position: vowel. Second most common vowel. Pronunciation is mid-back unrounded — tricky for English speakers but very frequent. Appears in 버스 커피.
jamo_position: choseong and jongseong. Very common. Tent/arrow shape — visually memorable. Minor irregularity: as batchim ㅅ is realized as unreleased t-like stop. Appears in 버스 화장실.

jamo_position: vowel. Very common. Single horizontal stroke — simple shape. Pronunciation has no English equivalent; rule_gateway_value high because it introduces the neutral vowel concept. Appears in 마트 은행.
jamo_position: choseong (rarely jongseong in learner vocabulary). Common. Clear j sound for English speakers. Appears in 지하철 주차 화장실.
jamo_position: choseong and jongseong. Very common. Confusability_penalty: easy to confuse with ㅋ (aspirated k). Initial g, final unreleased k. Appears in 국 김치 약국.
jamo_position: vowel. Common. Compound of ㅓ + y-glide. Appears in 면 역 병원.

jamo_position: choseong and jongseong. Very common. Pronunciation varies (r-like word-initially or after vowel, l-like as batchim or before consonant) — irregularity_penalty applies. Distinctive shape. Appears in 물 출구 서울.
jamo_position: choseong (and jongseong with aspiration effect). Common. Easy h sound. Minor irregularity: ㅎ batchim causes aspiration of following consonant. Appears in 한국 화장실 은행.
jamo_position: choseong and jongseong. Common. Confusability_penalty: similar to ㅍ (aspirated p). Initial b, final unreleased p. Appears in 밥 비빔밥 버스.
jamo_position: choseong and jongseong. Common. Confusability_penalty: similar to ㅌ (aspirated t). Initial d, final unreleased t. Appears in domain words as components of compounds.
jamo_position: choseong. Less common. Clear ch sound. Appears in 김치 출구 주차.
jamo_position: vowel. Less common. Compound of ㅏ + y-glide. Visually intuitive once ㅏ is known. Lower domain coverage in target domains.
jamo_position: vowel. Common. Confusability_penalty: very similar to ㅔ (e) — modern Seoul speech merges these. Appears in 택시 노래 은행.
jamo_position: choseong. Less common in native words but high in loanwords (target domain). Confusability_penalty: similar to ㄱ. Appears in 커피 케이크 카페 택시.
jamo_position: vowel. Common. ㅐ and ㅔ are merged in contemporary Seoul pronunciation — teach together and note merger. Appears in 메뉴 케이크 카페.
jamo_position: vowel. Less common. Compound of ㅜ + y-glide. Appears in 메뉴. Teach once ㅜ is established.
jamo_position: vowel. Less common. Compound of ㅗ + y-glide. Lower domain coverage.
jamo_position: choseong. Less common. Confusability_penalty: similar to ㄷ. Appears in 마트 택시.
jamo_position: choseong. Less common in native words but in loanwords. Confusability_penalty: similar to ㅂ. Appears in 커피 카페.
jamo_position: choseong and jongseong. More common than other tense consonants due to 있 (to exist) and 없 (to not exist). Still defer unless an anchor word requires it.
jamo_position: vowel (compound). Appears in 화장실 영화. rule_gateway_value moderate because it unlocks compound vowel pattern. Confusability: can look crowded in small fonts.
jamo_position: vowel. Less common. Compound of ㅔ + y-glide. Merged with ㅒ in some positions. Defer.
jamo_position: vowel (compound). Appears in 병원 원. rule_gateway_value moderate. Defer until an anchor requires it.
jamo_position: vowel (compound). Uncommon. Defer.
jamo_position: vowel. Rare. Merged with ㅖ in modern pronunciation. Defer.
jamo_position: vowel (compound). Uncommon. Appears in 외 words. Pronunciation varies (oe vs we). Defer.
jamo_position: vowel (compound). Appears in 의사 의 (possessive particle). Pronunciation highly irregular: realized as ui/i/e depending on position — irregularity_penalty high. Defer.
jamo_position: choseong. Tense/fortis consonant. Harder to distinguish for beginners; confusability with ㄱ and ㅋ. Defer unless a strong anchor requires it.
jamo_position: choseong. Tense/fortis consonant. Appears in 떡볶이 but that is outside first target domains. Defer to later lessons.
jamo_position: choseong. Tense/fortis consonant. Rare in target domain vocabulary. Defer.
jamo_position: choseong. Tense/fortis consonant. Very rare in target domains. Defer to advanced lessons.
jamo_position: vowel (compound). Rare. Merged with ㅚ in modern pronunciation. Defer.
jamo_position: vowel (compound). Rare. Defer.
